migration.last_checkpoint: checkpoint A10 complete — final bug fixes + release v5.0.0. BUG-001 FULL FIX at c9f60f2 (NaudioAudioEngine.LoadAsync now creates new reader before acquiring _readerLock, preventing race on reader/waveOut swap). BUG-004 FULL FIX at 1eabcae (SpotifySource adds _refreshGuard SemaphoreSlim so concurrent callers serialize token refresh through SpotifyTokenManager). BUG-005 FULL FIX at c210f1a (ParticleSystemVisualizer band index formula changed from i*N/bands to (i*(N-1))/(bands-1) — eliminates off-by-one at max-energy band). BUG-007 FULL FIX at 6430f3d (LrcFile.GetCurrentLineIndex: < changed back to <=, lines now activate at exact timestamp). BUG-009 FULL FIX at ff798b6 (AudioEngineObservableExtensions adds WhenPlaybackStarted/Paused/Stopped/TrackEnded/TrackLoaded/WhenPlayStateChanged — ReactiveUI layer no longer needs lambda workarounds). BUG-010 FULL FIX at 3fcd096 (SoundCloudSource.SearchAsync: user JsonElement checked for ValueKind==Object before TryGetProperty). BUG-011 FULL FIX at 02309d9 (YouTubeSource.OpenStreamAsync: discovers yt-dlp on PATH, throws descriptive exception if output empty). Version bumped to 5.0.0 in all .csproj files. AboutView.axaml added. Merged dev→staging→main. Tagged v5.0.0.

phases.description: Audio engine, format readers, device enumeration
SQLite library, metadata, folder watcher, genre filter, album grid, FTS5, batch ops
14 GDI+ visualizers, WASAPI loopback, FFT processor, waveform buffer, spectrum smoother, pipeline coordinator
Avalonia setup, Core extraction, architecture refactor

Core audio pipeline (FftProcessor, WaveformBuffer, SpectrumSmoother, AudioPipeline), NaudioAudioEngine, library/queue/streaming ports, App ViewModels, AXAML views, PositionService, CoverArtService, HotkeyService, TrayService, design tokens, MainWindow wired

Playlist system (static+smart, evaluator), TagEditorService, Settings, EqualizerEffect, LastFmScrobbler, ReplayGainReader, DuplicateDetector, AlbumArtResolver, BrowseViewModel, FileDialogService, ScanProgressViewModel

IVisualizer/VisualizerRegistry, BeatDetector, ColorPalette, SkiaVisualizerBase, 19 Skia visualizers (bars, waveform, oscilloscope, VU, circular, mirror, heatmap, particles, starfield, lissajous, 3D bars, neon rings, beat pulse, reactive bg, waterfall, spiral, chromatic, mosaic, reactive gradient), VisualizerCanvas, VisualizerPickerControl, VisualizerScriptHost (Jint), HtmlVisualizerHost stub, VisualizerScriptManager, VisualizerContextHelper, VisualizerPresetStore, VisualizerSettingsViewModel, test suite. BUG-003 fixed. BUG-005/006 partial.

BPM analysis (BpmAnalyzer onset detection, KeyAnalyzer Krumhansl-Schmuckler, AnalysisWorker 30s PCM, AnalysisCache atomic JSON, BeatGrid), streaming Avalonia (StreamingViewModel, StreamingSearchView, StreamingTrackExtensions), capsule v4 (CapsuleReader/Writer ZIP, CapsuleViewModel, CapsuleService), scrobbling overhaul (ScrobbleService multi-scrobbler + offline queue, ListenBrainzScrobbler music_service_name, ListeningHistoryViewModel, ScrobblingStatusViewModel, ScrobblingSettingsPanel), BpmViewModel cache-first, BeatGridOverlayControl, MetronomeView, MainViewModel auto-BPM on track load. No new bugs.

Queue system Avalonia rewrite with full drag-reorder, BUG-012 full fix — PlayQueue.Move() in-place shuffle index update, QueueItemControl, QueuePanel, DragDropBehavior, QueueService, QueueHistoryService, QueueSearchViewModel
Lyrics system (LRC, sync, Timing Studio, annotations). BUG-007 injected.
Capsules v5 (ECDSA signed, trust store, cache), reactive timelines, Album World (.spectral)
Shared Play (WebSocket), Discord RPC, OBS overlay (port 5128). BUG-008 injected.
xUnit tests (245 total), packaging (Windows/Mac/Linux). BUG-006 + BUG-008 full fixes.
Final polish, all remaining bug fixes, release v5.0.0

modules.description: Final bugs, cross-platform polish, version 5.0.0, AboutView, merged dev→staging→main, tagged v5.0.0

bugs.name: Format switch race condition
bugs.note: Race in SwitchFormat: _reader/_waveProvider swapped without lock. Full fix: LoadAsync creates new reader before acquiring _readerLock; Seek also holds the lock.

bugs.name: Null reference on cover art
bugs.note: WinForms MetadataExtractor accessed file.Tag.Pictures[0] unconditionally. Core MetadataExtractor guards with Pictures != null && Length > 0.

bugs.name: WASAPI loopback resource leak
bugs.note: MMDeviceEnumerator+MMDevice COM refs not disposed. Full fix in A3: WasapiLoopbackCaptureAdapter tracks and disposes all three handles.

bugs.name: Spotify token refresh race
bugs.note: SpotifySource now has _refreshGuard SemaphoreSlim; AcquireTokenAsync serializes all concurrent token refreshes.

bugs.name: FFT bounds check off-by-one
bugs.note: ParticleSystemVisualizer: formula changed to (i*(N-1))/(bands-1) which distributes evenly and never reaches index N.

bugs.name: 3D visualizer GPU texture leak
bugs.note: Bar3DVisualizer leaks SKSurface on resize. Partial fix disposes before reassign. Full fix in A9 also fills the empty Dispose() override.

bugs.name: Lyric timeline index off-by-one
bugs.note: GetCurrentLineIndex uses <= so lines activate at exact timestamp instead of one tick late.

bugs.name: WebSocket subscription leak
bugs.note: ReconnectAsync() creates a new CTS and WebSocket without cancelling the previous ReceiveLoopAsync. Old loop holds event handler closures indefinitely. Manifests as duplicate SyncReceived events on reconnect.

bugs.name: WinForms event pattern in Core
bugs.note: AudioEngineObservableExtensions.cs wraps all EventHandler events via Observable.FromEventPattern, giving ReactiveUI layer proper IObservable<T> without rewriting NaudioAudioEngine.

bugs.name: SoundCloud metadata null check
bugs.note: SoundCloudSource now checks user.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Object before calling TryGetProperty, handles null user on private/deleted tracks.

bugs.name: YouTube yt-dlp silent failure
bugs.note: YouTubeSource.OpenStreamAsync now locates yt-dlp on PATH, runs process, and throws InvalidOperationException with stderr detail when output is empty.

bugs.name: Queue index out of sync after shuffle
bugs.note: Next() in shuffle mode used _currentIndex as shuffle position. Partial fix adds _shufflePos. Full fix in A5: Move() now updates _shuffleOrder indices in-place (instead of RebuildShuffleOrder) so drag-reorder preserves shuffle traversal history.
